event_description: User clicked the 'Start your admissions plan' hero banner CTA.
User clicked the 'Explore services' hero banner secondary CTA.
User clicked the 'Book a consult' button in the navigation header.
User clicked the 'Ask about this plan' CTA on a pricing plan card.
User manually navigated to a specific card in the services help carousel.
User successfully submitted the free consultation request form.
Consultation form submission returned an error on the client side.
Server confirmed a valid consultation request was received and email sent.
